title: Haiti’s Frantzdy Pierrot grew up in Melrose. For him, the World Cup is a homecoming.

title: Registration doesn’t guarantee admission to World Cup fan fest in Boston, Wu says

Pedestrians walk past preparations for the FIFA Fan Festival outside Boston City Hall.

title: So long, ‘ZooMass’: Black bear gets the boot from UMass Amherst campus
author: Abby Patkin
bullets: Off Beat The female bear was also fitted with a radio collar to help state wildlife officials track essential information about survival and reproduction rates.
Massachusetts wildlife officials relocated a black bear who wandered onto the University of Massachusetts Amherst campus Wednesday.

Massachusetts Division of Fisheries & Wildlife By Abby Patkin June 12, 2026 | 2:24 PM 1 minute to read The University of Massachusetts Amherst’s official mascot may be Sam the Minuteman, but one curious bear evidently didn’t get the memo.
